context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the generate-tasks instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Task 0.0 is ALWAYS "Create feature branch" unless user explicitly says otherwise.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Each sub-task MUST be a single, clear action completable in 2-5 minutes.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Sub-tasks MUST include exact file paths, not vague references.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Every generated task list MUST contain the following elements (see [TASK_TEMPLATES.md](./TASK_TEMPLATES.md) for full template structures):

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Task 0.0** — "Create feature branch" with checkout command (e.g., `git checkout -b feature/name`)

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: `X.Xa` Write spec at `spec/...`

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: `X.Xb` Run spec — verify it **fails**

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: `X.Xd` Run spec — verify it **passes**

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Load these files only when their specific guidance is required:

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **[HEURISTICS.md](./HEURISTICS.md)** — Use when deciding the first spec to write for a given change type (endpoint, service, job, engine, bug fix)
